title: Retrofit electric drivetrain systems to bicycles
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Retrofit electric drivetrain systems to bicycles demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to retrofit system

pcs.text: Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret retrofit information, manufacturer specifications, and codes of practice1.3 Analyse retrofit options and select those required by the circumstances1.4 Identify hazards and manage risks associated with the work1.5 Identify, select and check retrofit tools and equipment for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret retrofit information, manufacturer specifications, and codes of practice1.3 Analyse retrofit options and select those required by the circumstances1.4 Identify hazards and manage risks associated with the work1.5 Identify, select and check retrofit tools and equipment for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Access and interpret retrofit information, manufacturer specifications, and codes of practice1.3 Analyse retrofit options and select those required by the circumstances1.4 Identify hazards and manage risks associated with the work1.5 Identify, select and check retrofit tools and equipment for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to retrofit system

elements.title: Dismantle system

pcs.text: Dismantle required components of bicycle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or system2.2 Recover all additional parts of bicycle not required for refit and store for customer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Dismantle required components of bicycle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or system2.2 Recover all additional parts of bicycle not required for refit and store for customer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Dismantle required components of bicycle according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or system2.2 Recover all additional parts of bicycle not required for refit and store for customer.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Dismantle system

elements.title: Retrofit system

pcs.text: Access and interpret technical information relating to electric drivetrain system and the donor bicycle being retrofitted3.2 Carry out electric drivetrain system modification procedures according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Test system for electrical and mechanical functionality according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Calibrate computer control system according to local regulations, laws and manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.5 Carry out post-modification testing according to workplace procedures and check test results to confirm system performance is operating to manufacturer specifications, resolve reported pre-modification issues, and confirm no other faults are present
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Access and interpret technical information relating to electric drivetrain system and the donor bicycle being retrofitted3.2 Carry out electric drivetrain system modification procedures according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Test system for electrical and mechanical functionality according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Calibrate computer control system according to local regulations, laws and manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.5 Carry out post-modification testing according to workplace procedures and check test results to confirm system performance is operating to manufacturer specifications, resolve reported pre-modification issues, and confirm no other faults are present?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Access and interpret technical information relating to electric drivetrain system and the donor bicycle being retrofitted3.2 Carry out electric drivetrain system modification procedures according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Test system for electrical and mechanical functionality according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, and safety and environmental requirements3.4 Calibrate computer control system according to local regulations, laws and manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures3.5 Carry out post-modification testing according to workplace procedures and check test results to confirm system performance is operating to manufacturer specifications, resolve reported pre-modification issues, and confirm no other faults are present.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Retrofit system

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Make final inspection to ensure work meets workplace and customer specifications, and present components ready for use4.2 Clean work area, dispose of waste and non-recyclable materials, and collect and store recyclable material4.3 Completes workplace documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Make final inspection to ensure work meets workplace and customer specifications, and present components ready for use4.2 Clean work area, dispose of waste and non-recyclable materials, and collect and store recyclable material4.3 Completes workplace documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Make final inspection to ensure work meets workplace and customer specifications, and present components ready for use4.2 Clean work area, dispose of waste and non-recyclable materials, and collect and store recyclable material4.3 Completes workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
